caribbean.headline: Moderate Winds and Showers Impact Bimini Today
caribbean.paragraph: Bimini is experiencing sustained winds up to 30 kt with wave heights reaching 6.4 ft and a dominant swell from the SSE at an 8-second period. Rain probability is high at 72%, indicating periods of moderate showers likely affecting marine and port operations.

mediterranean.headline: Moderate Winds and High Waves Impact Cadiz Today
mediterranean.paragraph: Cadiz is experiencing moderate westerly winds sustained at 19 knots with significant wave heights reaching 8.7 feet and a swell period of 15 seconds. Rain probability is high at 81 percent, creating challenging conditions for maritime operations in the western Mediterranean.
